name: Ada Smith
abstract: Ada Beatrice Queen Victoria Louise Virginia "Bricktop" Smith DuConge (née Smith; August 14, 1894 – February 1, 1984) was an American dancer, jazz singer, vaudevillian, and self-described saloon-keeper who owned the famous nightclub Chez Bricktop in Paris from 1924 to 1961, as well as clubs in Mexico City and Rome.

about_quotes.speaker: Arthur Briggs
about_quotes.evidence: I formed the orchestra, and meanwhile there was a very fine person from Chicago, who was in Paris, and she had, what you would call a bar, that we called the Grand Duc. Ada Smith.
